name: mojo-boolable-trait-conformance
description: Split a raising __bool__ into a non-raising Boolable-conformant __bool__ plus a bool_strict() variant. Use when: (1) a struct has fn __bool__(self) raises -> Bool preventing Boolable trait conformance, (2) you want Bool(t) syntax to work without a try/except, (3) you need NumPy-style silent False for multi-element containers alongside PyTorch-style strict raising.
